sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27920" key="dolixo/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δολῐχό-πους</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">πουν</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n27920.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δολιχήπους.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
